name: KOMEDA Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: KOMEDA Holdings Co., Ltd. operates a chain of coffee shops in Japan. The company operates 896 stores. It is also involved in the manufacture and sale of breads; sale of other food and equipment; and sub-lease of stores. In addition, the company provides consultancy services for the construction of new stores. KOMEDA Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is based in Nagoya, Japan.
